reasoning: There is currently no approved vaccine for Burkholderia infections, with most research still in pre-clinical stages (in silico, animal models). The Wikipedia page "List of infectious diseases" correctly leaves the vaccine column blank for this entry. Without a late-stage clinical trial nearing completion or regulatory approval, the chance of a vaccine being successfully developed and Wikipedia being updated to reflect this before the end of 2025 is extremely low. Probabilities are kept near the absolute minimum for all dates, slightly increasing for longer horizons to account for very unlikely unforeseen breakthroughs or Wikipedia vandalism that might remain on the resolution date.
